summary: Missing sdk.path.get() mock in bootstrap test — currently guarded by seededPath but could break if test setup changes
details: The bootstrap test at bootstrap.test.ts doesn't mock sdk.path.get() which is called by loadPathQuery. Currently the test avoids this path because seededPath is set (global.path.directory === input.directory). However, if the test setup changes or someone removes the seeded guard, the test would fail because sdk.path.get() is not mocked. Adding it defensively now.
